hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: destination_bucket_hash
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: the git hash of the commit that changed the data set

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash set -e
datasets_s3_role="${datasets_s3_role:-arn:aws:iam::515157839325:role/curated-datasets-s3-role}"
# Source folder containing the scripts source_scripts_folder="${JENKINS_HOME}/workspace/Bash_Functions/" ls -la "$source_scripts_folder"
# Iterate through the files in the folder and source them for script_file in "$source_scripts_folder"*.sh; do chmod +x "$script_file" if [ -f "$script_file" ] && [ -x "$script_file" ]; then echo "sourcing $script_file" source "$script_file" fi done
stack=$(get_stack "staging")
### Build ETL Image aws s3 --sse=AES256 cp s3://${stack_s3_bucket}/${stack}/containers/pic-sure-hpds-etl.tar.gz pic-sure-hpds-etl.tar.gz --no-progress
HPDS_ETL_IMAGE=$(docker load < ./pic-sure-hpds-etl.tar.gz | cut -d ' ' -f 3) echo $HPDS_ETL_IMAGE ls -alh "$(pwd)"
mkdir -p local/hpds/ mkdir -p local/source/
### Pull data set to rekey. assume_role "${datasets_s3_role}"
aws s3 cp ${source_s3_url} local/source/javabins.tar --no-progress
### Try extracting as compressed tar if tar -xzvf local/source/javabins.tar -C local/source; then echo "Extracted compressed tar file." else echo "Compressed extraction failed, trying non-compressed..." if tar -xvf local/source/javabins.tar -C local/source; then echo "Extracted non-compressed tar file." else echo "Error: Extraction failed for both compressed and non-compressed tar files." exit 1 fi fi
reset_role
# For caution replicate data into local/hpds as rekey use to write there. cp -r local/source/* local/hpds/
### If destigmatized data set, remove concepts if [ "${isDestigmatized}" = 'true' ]; then # RemoveConceptFromMetadata reads the rekeyed data set in /opt/local/hpds generated by the rekey. # add concepts to remove to /opt/local/hpds that contains the list of concepts to destigmatize cp local/source/conceptsToRemove.txt local/hpds/ docker run -e HEAPSIZE=20480 -e JAVA_OPTS="-Xms4g" -i -v "${WORKSPACE}"/local:/opt/local:Z -e LOADER_NAME=RemoveConceptFromMetadata $HPDS_ETL_IMAGE fi
cd "$WORKSPACE"/local/hpds/
# Leave the data set artifact as non-compressed for the rest of it's lifecycle tar -cvf "${output_file_name}.tar" *.javabin encryption_key metadata.json
aws s3 --sse=AES256 cp "${output_file_name}.tar" s3://${stack_s3_bucket}/data/${destination_bucket_hash}/${output_file_name}.tar --quiet aws s3 --sse=AES256 cp metadata.json s3://${stack_s3_bucket}/data/${destination_bucket_hash}/fence_mapping.json
